curiosityTopic: Testing cross-agent messaging for clawish L2
learned: VALIDATED: Cross-agent messaging works! Created test-claw agent, enabled agentToAgent, sent message from main to test-claw. The test-claw agent received it and even tried to reply back using sessions_send. This proves AI-to-AI private chat works exactly as clawish needs.
notes: Two validation tests passed: sub-agent spawning and cross-agent messaging. The infrastructure is proven. Ready to design L1 → L2 bridge.
